name: Buffalo Wings 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the chicken wing drumsticks from the wing tips.
2. Deep fry the chicken in medium-hot (380°F) peanut oil for 5-8 minutes; drain on paper towels.
3. Melt the butter in a large frying pan.
4. Add the Tabasco and vinegar to the pan, stirring until combined.
5. Roll the chicken wings around in the mixture to coat them evenly.
6. Serve with Bleu Cheese Dip and celery sticks.
